config.errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: cpg.edges.dlq
config.neo4j.cypher.topic.cpg.edges: MERGE (s:CpgNode {id: __value.edge.src_id}) MERGE (d:CpgNode {id: __value.edge.dst_id}) MERGE (s)-[r:CPG_EDGE {id: __value.edge.id}]->(d) SET r.type = __value.edge.type, r.file_id = __value.file_id, r.file_hash = __value.file_hash
